form.formComment: Last start 7th of 11 at Port Lincoln Bm66 on March 29 over 1350m, 3 len behind Power Primo carrying 57.5kg at $4.80. The start before that 5th of 10 at Port Lincoln Bm70 on March 15 over 1350m, 2.5 len behind My Mate Sonny with 58kg at $7.50. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: Comes off a 44 day let-up. At the latest run came from midfield and won by 0.9 len at Port Lincoln 4yo+ 0-60 February 27 over 1210m defeating Broadway Lane with 59.5kg at $4.60. The race before that 6th of 9 at Cranbourne 0-62 on January 3 over 1600m, 7 len behind Storm Ahead with 59kg at $8. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 5th of 9 at Port Lincoln Bm72 on March 15 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Messerschmitt with 54.5kg at $8.50. Second-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 10 at Port Lincoln Bm60 on March 29 over 1210m, 4 len behind Setteveli with 59kg at $18. Hard to fault if at his best.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Balaklava Cl2 on April 1 over 1400m, head behind Stokomo carrying 54.5kg at $31. The race before that won by 1.2 len at Streaky Bay Bm62 March 21 over 1350m defeating My Crackling with 54.5kg at $3.50. Right at home on dirt - happy to stick.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nine months eased back early on 6th of 8 at Balaklava Cge 0-56 on April 1 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Testa Dexta with 58kg at $31. Previously second-up 7th of 13 at Strathalbyn 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on January 15 2025 over 1350m, 4.5 len behind Our Glamour Girl carrying 56.5kg at $2.90. Can do much better this time with the run under his belt.
